hero.tagline: A Hero's Tale Starting From Zero
hero.romaji: Re:ZERO − Starting Life in Another World
hero.desc1: Natsuki Subaru, an ordinary high school student, is suddenly summoned to another world.
hero.desc4: No matter how many times he dies, he rises again for those he loves.

story.label: STORY
story.title: Story
story.intro: The tale of a boy who possesses the power of "Return by Death" and fights again and again for those he loves.
story.powerDesc1: The unique magic ability possessed by Natsuki Subaru.
story.powerDesc2: The power to rewind time to a specific point upon death—an endless cycle of resurrection.
story.powerNote: ── Yet the pain and memories never fade.

arc01.title: Origins
arc01.subtitle: The Summoned Boy
arc01.desc: An ordinary high schooler with nothing special, Natsuki Subaru is suddenly summoned to another world. There he meets a silver-haired girl named Emilia. To protect her, Subaru repeats "Return by Death" countless times.

arc02.title: The Mansion
arc02.subtitle: Tragedy at Roswaal's Estate
arc02.desc: Repeated tragedy unfolds inside the seemingly peaceful Roswaal mansion. Experiencing death over and over to protect his friends, Subaru inches toward the truth.

arc03.title: White Whale
arc03.subtitle: Battle Against the Demon Beast
arc03.desc: A desperate clash against the White Whale, the invincible demon beast. Subaru leads his allies to challenge the creature that has never been defeated in history.

arc04.title: The Sanctuary
arc04.subtitle: The Sanctuary and the Witch's Shadow
arc04.desc: A story of trials unfolding in a cursed sanctuary. As the shadow of the Jealousy Witch Satella closes in, Subaru faces his greatest ordeal.

subaru.name: Natsuki Subaru
subaru.desc: The protagonist — lacking in knowledge, skill, strength, and caution. Suddenly summoned to another world and tossed about in a bewildering situation. Though he voices his weakness in adversity, his fearless nature and inherent boldness push him to face a cruel fate.

emilia.name: Emilia
emilia.desc: A beautiful half-elf girl with silver hair and violet-blue eyes — identical to those of the Witch of Jealousy who once nearly destroyed the world. She has a kind and caring personality, though she is somehow reluctant to openly admit it. She travels with the small spirit Puck, who takes the form of a cat.

puck.name: Puck
puck.desc: The spirit contracted to Emilia. A Great Spirit who governs fire and is one of the Four Great Spirits with immense power. In his usual form he appears as a small cat with gray fur, round eyes, and a pink nose. He calls himself Emilia's guardian and is always at her side.

rem.name: Rem
rem.desc: The maid who single-handedly handles all the chores at Roswaal's manor. The manor's functionality owes entirely to her capable hands. She is a survivor of the oni clan — one of the demi-humans with especially great power — and deeply admires her twin sister Ram.

ram.name: Ram
ram.desc: Ram is Rem's twin sister and a maid at Roswaal's manor — yet her stats in cooking, laundry, sewing, and cleaning all fall below her sister's. Once hailed as a prodigy of the oni clan, her power was lost after she lost her horn.

beatrice.name: Beatrice
beatrice.desc: A spirit in the form of a girl, serving as librarian of the Forbidden Library in Roswaal's manor. Her adorable looks and elaborate dress give an impression like that of a fairy. Despite her haughty behavior, she is actually a lonely soul who cannot be honest with herself. She calls Puck 'big bro' and holds him in great affection.

roswaal.name: Roswaal L Mathers
roswaal.desc: A Lugunica noble acting as Emilia's sponsor in the Royal Selection, holding the rank of Margrave. He is also one of the kingdom's foremost mages and known at court as the chief court mage — yet this impressive resume and overflowing talent are undermined by his eccentric behavior and jester-like makeup.

frederica.name: Frederica Baumann
frederica.desc: A tall beauty with clear emerald eyes — provided she hides her fangs. She is the senior maid to Ram and Rem and her loyalty and ability in service to Roswaal are impeccable. She and Garfiel are siblings, and she too carries demi-human blood.

petra.name: Petra Leyte
petra.desc: The village beauty of Arlam, the village near Roswaal's estate. She has a cute face, a sharp mind, is dexterous in everything she does, and is a quick learner — a truly talented girl. After volunteering in response to recruitment, she is hired as a new maid at Roswaal's estate.

patrasche.name: Patrasche
patrasche.desc: A Diana-breed ground dragon known for being excellent but too proud and difficult to handle. Yet for some reason she shows loyalty to Subaru from the very first meeting. Originally kept and valued at Crusch's estate, she became Subaru's earth dragon after the battle with the White Whale. She is female.

otto.name: Otto Suwen
otto.desc: A young man blessed with the 'Soul Language' ability — able to communicate with any creature — and a resourceful mind, yet utterly forsaken by luck. A traveling merchant by trade, he ended up joining Emilia's camp as an internal affairs officer after helping Subaru during the Sanctuary incident.

garfiel.name: Garfiel Tinsel
garfiel.desc: A hot-tempered, savage young man whose personality matches his fierce eyes and sharp fangs. He once opposed Subaru as the Guardian of the Sanctuary, but after reconciling he came to look up to him as an older brother and joined Emilia's camp as a military officer. He holds the 'Earth Spirit's Blessing' and can transform into a giant tiger.

felt.name: Felt
felt.desc: A girl who grew up in the slums making a living through theft. Reinhard noticed her gold hair and red eyes — features of the Lugunica royal bloodline — and took her under his protection, making her one of the Royal Selection candidates.

reinhard.name: Reinhard Van Astrea
reinhard.desc: A member of the Royal Guard, praised as the 'Knight among Knights' at a young age. Born into the distinguished Astrea family that has produced Sword Saints for generations, he is said to be the strongest Sword Saint in history. He protects Felt and participates in the Royal Selection as her knight.

crusch.name: Crusch Karsten
crusch.desc: One of the Royal Selection candidates, head of the noble Karsten household. Born with the charisma to stand above others, she is a talented woman who inherited the dukedom at a young age. Though once considered the frontrunner in the Selection, she loses all her memories after being attacked by a Sin Archbishop following the White Whale hunt. She possesses the 'Wind Reading Blessing' that detects lies.

ferris.name: Ferris
ferris.desc: Crusch's knight and the finest healing mage in the royal capital. He wears frilly clothing and has adorable mannerisms, topped with soft cat ears — seemingly calculated to appeal, yet it suits him perfectly. His loyalty to Crusch, a long-standing companion, runs deep. He is male.

wilhelm.name: Wilhelm Van Astrea
wilhelm.desc: A master swordsman once known throughout the land as the 'Sword Demon.' A devoted husband whose sweet talk of his wife is so direct it even embarrasses Subaru. As Crusch's attendant, he patiently waited for the chance to slay the White Whale — the creature that took the life of his wife, the former Sword Saint Theresia.

anastasia.name: Anastasia Hoshin
anastasia.desc: One of the Royal Selection candidates. A young merchant who leads a great trading company from the neighboring nation of Kararagi. She possesses boundless greed and ambition, and entered the Royal Selection to bring the kingdom under her control. She maintains a mercenary unit as a private army, reflecting her personal taste in its roster.

julius.name: Julius Juukulius
julius.desc: A fine knight with handsome features, graceful bearing, noble birth, and a confirmed rank. A member of the Royal Guard considered the 'Finest Knight' among all knights. Skilled in swordplay and magic, he holds the deep trust of his fellow knights. He fights alongside Anastasia in the Royal Selection as her knight.

joshua.name: Joshua Juukulius
joshua.desc: Julius's younger brother — a handsome boy with a distinctive monocle. He arrives at Roswaal's estate alongside Mimi as Anastasia's messenger, inviting Subaru and the others to the watergate city of Pristella.

mimi.name: Mimi Pearlbaton
mimi.desc: A catfolk girl serving as vice-captain of the Iron Fang, the mercenary unit exclusively employed by Hoshin Trading. Frank and free-spirited, she possesses combat ability fitting of a vice-captain. She is the oldest of triplets, and her two younger brothers also serve as vice-captains. She has the 'Trisect Blessing' that lets the siblings share fatigue and wounds.

hetaro.name: Hetaro Pearlbaton
hetaro.desc: A catfolk boy serving as vice-captain of the Iron Fang. He is Mimi's younger brother and Tivey's older brother. Trusted greatly by captain Ricardo and the unit members, he often takes command. By personality he is a bit timid and an extreme sister-complex.

tivey.name: Tivey Pearlbaton
tivey.desc: A catfolk boy serving as vice-captain of the Iron Fang, wearing a monocle. The youngest of the triplets, he is sharp-minded and handles accounting and negotiations, making him practically Anastasia's right-hand man. Cool-headed, he neither speaks nor acts unless harm comes to him directly.

ricardo.name: Ricardo Welkin
ricardo.desc: The captain who leads the Iron Fang mercenary unit exclusively employed by Hoshin Trading. A tall, muscular beastman with a wolf-like face and brown fur. He has known Anastasia since she was a child and is one of the few people she truly trusts. He wields a large hatchet with ease and boasts high combat ability. Cheerful and crude, yet full of humanity.

priscilla.name: Priscilla Barielle
priscilla.desc: One of the Royal Selection candidates known as the 'Blood-Stained Bride.' Arrogant, bold, and utterly self-centered — she boasts extraordinary luck, declaring that the world is arranged for her own benefit.

al.name: Al
al.desc: A one-armed man whose head is covered by a jet-black full-helm and whose body below the neck is dressed in bandit-like fashion. His sturdy build and battlefield-worn bearing are undermined by his breezy, flippant attitude. An oddity who became Priscilla's knight by charming her with his unusual appearance and remarks rather than fighting prowess.

elsa.name: Elsa Granhiert
elsa.desc: A beautiful woman with long black hair and an alluring presence. Her true identity is an assassin who was targeting Emilia's insignia on behalf of a client. She possesses an abnormality that excites her when she slashes open an abdomen and examines its contents with her uniquely-shaped knife — earning her the alias 'Bowel Hunter.'

meili.name: Meili Portroute
meili.desc: The girl who manipulated witch beasts in Arlam village, causing the curse-driven commotion. Her true identity is an assassin with the alias 'Witch Beast Tamer' who is close to Elsa like a little sister.

ryuzu.name: Ryuzu Birma
ryuzu.desc: A woman who has a long and deep relationship with Garfiel, calling him 'Gar-bou' and looking out for him. Despite her childlike appearance, her composed and aged mannerisms perplex Subaru and the others.

petelgeuse.name: Petelgeuse Romaneeconti
petelgeuse.desc: One of the Sin Archbishops, senior members of the Witch Cult. He is the Archbishop of Sloth. He worships the Witch of Jealousy and holds it as his supreme purpose to repay her favor. He is a firm believer that diligence is virtue and sloth is vice. He controls the 'Unseen Hands' and blocked Subaru's path time and again.

regulus.name: Regulus Corneus
regulus.desc: One of the Sin Archbishops. He is the Archbishop of Greed. He has held the Archbishop's seat for at least 100 years. He preaches his own selflessness and advocates pacifism, yet in practice he imposes his values on everyone around him and declares himself a perfected human being — the embodiment of approval-seeking and self-aggrandizement.

rye.name: Rye Batenkaitos
rye.desc: One of the Sin Archbishops. He is the Archbishop of Gluttony. He looks like a harmless child, but every word and action is dominated by an almost abnormal obsession with food, and he is always in high spirits. He stands out for his teasing, breezy attitude and never loses his own pace no matter what situation he faces.

sirius.name: Sirius Romaneeconti
sirius.desc: One of the Sin Archbishops. She is the Archbishop of Wrath. A creepy figure with bandages wrapped haphazardly over the entire body except the left eye. She goes by the surname 'Romaneeconti,' shared with Petelgeuse.

capella.name: Capella Emerada Lugunica
capella.desc: One of the Sin Archbishops. She is the Archbishop of Lust. A girl with golden hair and red eyes, sharing the name of a Lugunica royal who existed over fifty years ago. She is characterized by a brutal personality and an utterly vulgar manner of speech — a monster that tramples on the dignity and values of others.

roy.name: Roy Alphard
roy.desc: One of the Sin Archbishops. He is the Archbishop of Gluttony. Like Rye, he devours names and memories. Behind his smile he harbors an abnormal appetite and cruelty, calling himself 'Gourmet' as he prioritizes satiating himself above all. A scoundrel who unhesitatingly tramples others' lives for his own happiness.

rui.name: Rui Arneb
rui.desc: One of the Sin Archbishops — the third Archbishop of Gluttony. Unlike the childishly carefree Rye and Roy, she carries a detached manner of speaking and an empty atmosphere. Though she appears as an angelic girl, her true nature is wicked — at times feeling more evil than the other two combined.

liliana.name: Liliana Masquerade
liliana.desc: A bard and the 'Songstress' of Pristella. Her singing voice, accompanied by the instrument called Lyulyre, captivates everyone who hears it. In contrast to her graceful performances, she is constantly high-energy and her eccentric behavior stands out — a somewhat odd girl. She is a celebrity enthusiast and very starstruck.

kiritaka.name: Kiritaka Muse
kiritaka.desc: The young head of Muse Commerce, a trading house that has long dealt in magic ore and effectively controls Pristella. His commercial talent is high, and he is normally calm and composed — but when it comes to Liliana, he transforms into an obsessive fan.

heinkel.name: Heinkel Astrea
heinkel.desc: Vice-captain of the Lugunica Royal Guard. Son of Wilhelm and Theresia, head of the current Astrea household, and Reinhard's father.

shaula.name: Shaula
shaula.desc: The Star Guardian of the Pleiades Watchtower, standing at the deepest point of the impassable Augria Sand Dunes. She has a striking appearance with scorpion-like features, and her words and deeds are shrouded in mystery. The 'Sage' Shaula, one of the Three Heroes who saved the world, is recorded in history as a man — but her true identity is…

reid.name: Reid Astrea
reid.desc: The First Sword Saint who was active approximately 400 years ago and the founding ancestor of the Astrea family. He is spoken of as the strongest swordsman in history with unparalleled talent. His name is known throughout Lugunica as one of the Three Heroes who saved the world, and he is a goal for many swordsmen. He is also described as a magnanimous and extraordinary individual.

echidna.name: Echidna
echidna.desc: A mysterious beauty Subaru encounters. She is characterized by her jet-black dress and hair as white as if all color had been drained from it. What fate awaits Subaru, invited to her tea party…?

minerva.name: Minerva
minerva.desc: One of the six witches bearing the name of a deadly sin, destroyed by the Witch of Jealousy. Her sin is Wrath. While lamenting a world full of conflict, she is said to have struck and healed all people.

daphne.name: Daphne
daphne.desc: One of the six witches bearing the name of a deadly sin, destroyed by the Witch of Jealousy. Her sin is Gluttony. To save the world from famine, she is said to have created beasts unlike those of the gods.

typhon.name: Typhon
typhon.desc: One of the six witches bearing the name of a deadly sin, destroyed by the Witch of Jealousy. Her sin is Pride. With the innocence and mercilessness of childhood, she is said to have continued judging the guilty.

sekhmet.name: Sekhmet
sekhmet.desc: One of the six witches bearing the name of a deadly sin, destroyed by the Witch of Jealousy. Her sin is Sloth. For the sole purpose of bringing tranquility, she is said to have driven the dragon beyond the great waterfall.

carmilla.name: Carmilla
carmilla.desc: One of the six witches bearing the name of a deadly sin, destroyed by the Witch of Jealousy. Her sin is Lust. To fill the world with love, she is said to have granted emotions to those who were not human.

pandora.name: Pandora
pandora.desc: Known as the Witch of Vanity, a being separate from the Seven Deadly Sin Witches. She possesses an extraordinary ability to rewrite any event, and her true identity and purpose remain shrouded in mystery. She is connected to the deepest layers of the story as the one who visited Fortuna's Forest, where Emilia spent her childhood.

S1.title: 1st Season
S1.desc: From the isekai summoning to royal capital intrigue and the White Whale hunt. The origin where Subaru's "Return by Death" is first depicted.

S2.title: 2nd Season
S2.desc: Trials in the Sanctuary and the truth of the witch. The emotional second chapter where Subaru and Emilia's bond deepens.

S3.title: 3rd Season
S3.desc: New threats and adventure with allies. The third chapter where the world of Re:Zero expands further.

S4.title: 4th Season
S4.desc: Pleiades Watchtower Arc. Seeking the "Sage" Shaula, Subaru heads into the Augria Sand Dunes — a wasteland that even the mightiest Sword Saint could not conquer — to restore the sleeping Rem and stolen memories.

s1e01.title: The End of the Beginning and the Beginning of the End
s1e01.summary: On his way home from a convenience store, Natsuki Subaru is suddenly summoned to another world. His eyes light up at the fantasy world before him, but the beautiful girl who presumably summoned him is nowhere to be found. He soon gets accosted by thugs — and then a single girl appears before him…

s1e06.title: The Sound of Chains
s1e06.summary: The third first day at Roswaal's manor begins. The sound of chains heard just before his deaths echoes in Subaru's mind. To break the stalemate, Subaru leaves the manor before the fourth deadly night to observe from outside.

s1e13.title: Self-Proclaimed Knight Natsuki Subaru
s1e13.summary: Before the assembled Royal Selection candidates, Reinhard arrives with Felt. He declares Felt the fifth candidate, saying the Selection truly begins with her participation — but Felt has no intention of joining.

s1e18.title: From Zero
s1e18.summary: Having let Rem die, Emilia slain, and suffering his own ignoble death, Subaru wakes again in Lugunica. Exhausted by everything, he grips Rem's hand with resolve and begins to run at full speed.

s1e25.title: That's All This Story Is
s1e25.summary: With Subaru as eyes and Julius as sword, they combine their abilities to face Petelgeuse's Unseen Hands. Covered in wounds but gradually increasing their reaction speed, Julius coordinates with Subaru and corners Petelgeuse to within one step of defeat.

s2e01.title: The False King's Selection
s2e01.summary: The trials of the Sanctuary begin. Together with new companions, Subaru and Emilia face the mysteries left behind by the witch.

s2e13.title: The Sanctuary and the Witch of Greed
s2e13.summary: Subaru closes in on the heart of the Sanctuary. At a tea party with Echidna, the Witch of Greed, he is confronted with the truth of the world and the secret behind his own Return by Death.

s2e25.title: His Return
s2e25.summary: After the long, grueling battle of the Sanctuary arc, Subaru overcomes all trials. He achieves victory alongside his companions and arrives at an emotional finale.

s3e01.title: Frozen Bonds
s3e01.summary: With a new threat bearing down on them, Subaru and the others head to the water gate city of Priestella. New encounters with allies and an unexpected battle begin.

s3e12.title: Moment of Decision
s3e12.summary: The fierce battle in Priestella reaches its conclusion. At great cost, Subaru and his friends renew their determination for the journey ahead.

s4e01.title: Reason to Take You Away / Gorgeous Tiger Reloaded
s4e01.summary: Though they managed to repel the Witch Cult's attack, the cost was heavy — people transformed by Lust, names and memories stolen by Gluttony. At Anastasia's suggestion, they decide to head for the Pleiades Watchtower, home of the Sage Shaula, one of Lugunica's Three Heroes.

s4e02.title: Break Through the Sand Time
s4e02.summary: With Ram, Rem, and Meili joining, the journey into the Augria Sand Dunes begins. But as rumored in town — 'no one has reached the tower in four hundred years' — the distance refuses to shrink. Ram uses her Clairvoyance to find a way through the desert mechanism that even stopped Reinhard.

s4e03.title: Guardian of the Watchtower
s4e03.summary: A spatial distortion sends Subaru underground in the dunes, where Ram wakes him. They reunite with Echidna and Patrasche but are separated from Emilia, Rem, and Beatrice. The twins' shared senses confirm Rem's safety, but there is no exit nearby. They advance through the dark underground corridor.

s4e04.title: Asterism of the White Starry Sky
s4e04.summary: Subaru wakes in the dragon carriage to learn from Beatrice that the group has safely reached the Pleiades Watchtower's interior. Shaula, the Star Guardian who calls him 'Master', greets him with an enthusiastic embrace. She guides the party into the tower's third floor — a testing ground to earn access to the Great Library Pleiades.

s4e05.title: Stick Swinger
s4e05.summary: Solving the star-themed trial transforms the third floor into a vast library. Touching one volume, Subaru relives a memory that embodies innocent cruelty. The group decides to clear other floors first. Pulling a sword from the white domain of the second floor, the next trial begins.

s4e06.title: Julius Juukulius
s4e06.summary: Waiting as examiner on the second floor is a red man calling himself a stick swinger. He draws chopsticks as his weapon against Julius's finest swordsmanship and crushes him effortlessly. After barely escaping to the fourth floor, Julius disappears without a trace.

s4e07.title: When I Left the Convenience Store, It Was a Wonderful World
s4e07.summary: Julius rests after his wounds from Reid. Unable to get useful hints from Shaula, the group retires. In the small hours Subaru finds Echidna on the balcony — speaking as an artificial spirit, not as Anastasia. Their frank conversation is overheard by Julius.

s4e08.title: Who Are You
s4e08.summary: On his way home from a convenience store, Subaru is summoned to another world — but has lost all his memories since arriving. He's told he's in a tower trial but receives no miraculous power. Wandering the tower, he encounters something unexpected.

s4e09.title: Wreckage
s4e09.summary: After two Return by Deaths since his amnesia, Subaru tries to escape the tower's killer. Swallowed by giant sand earthworms in the desert, he wanders underground. Unable to escape, he climbs to the fourth floor — and witnesses an unbearable sight.

s4e10.title: Murder Is a Habit
s4e10.summary: Subaru finds Meili's corpse and 'Natsuki Subaru was here' carved into his arm. He hides the body, but Beatrice has already found a Book of the Dead with Meili's name. Reading the book on the group's behalf, Subaru relives her lonely past. Diving too deep, a sweet inner voice begins to echo in his mind.

s4e11.title: Re:ZERO − Starting Life in Another World
s4e11.summary: Caught searching for Meili's missing body, Subaru is imprisoned in an ice cage. He desperately claims amnesia, but Ram remains convinced he is an impostor and knocks him out with wind magic. When he wakes, he is outside the cage — walls covered with 'Natsuki Subaru was here'. Behind him, Reid Astrea — who should not be on the fourth floor — waits.

world.label: WORLD
world.title: World
world.subtitle: The Kingdom of Lugunica and the World of Witches
world.witchesDesc: Seven witches who greatly influenced the world. Each bears the name of one of the seven deadly sins and claimed many lives 400 years ago.

lugnica.title: Kingdom of Lugunica
lugnica.desc: The primary setting of the story. A kingdom where four royal candidacy contestants compete in the royal selection.

sanctuary.title: The Sanctuary
sanctuary.desc: A hidden barrier land within Roswaal's forest. Those with mixed blood are bound by the barrier.

whaleWaters.title: Sea of the White Whale
whaleWaters.desc: A cursed misty sea where the invincible demon beast White Whale roams. Countless adventurers have lost their lives here.

witchCult.title: Witch Cult
witchCult.desc: A secret society that worships the Jealousy Witch Satella. The Sin Archbishops bearing the names of deadly sins threaten humanity.

fortuna.title: Elior Forest
fortuna.desc: A frozen forest where Emilia was born and raised. A place where past tragedies still slumber.

library.title: Forbidden Library
library.desc: An infinite library beneath Roswaal's mansion. The secret space Beatrice has guarded for hundreds of years.

footer.author: Author: Tappei Nagatsuki · Illustration: Shin'ichirō Ōtsuka
footer.quote: "Starting from zero, my life in another world."
